name: @jspsych-timelines/pursuit-rotor
description: Pursuit Rotor task for measuring motor coordination and learning. Participants track a moving target with mouse or touch input.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,iife,cjs --sourcemap --dts --treeshake --clean --global-name jsPsychTimelinePursuitRotor --inject-style && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js','dist/index.browser.js')" && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js.map','dist/index.browser.js.map')"
